recentTweets.text:
RT @cactus_politics: Eli Crane Demands Passage of SAVE America Act After Trump Speech on Election Interference

"This isn’t complicated, fo…

This isn’t complicated, folks.

Pass the SAVE America Act!
The swamp is real.

The Senate should immediately pass the SAVE America Act.

Secure our elections.

Great work, @JohnRich.

Arizonans appreciate everything you are doing.

Olive Garden’s never-ending pasta pass is more secure than our federal elections.

Make sense to anyone?

Pass the SAVE America Act.

ICYMI – @FEMA announced a new $600 million funding opportunity to help states, territories, and Tribal Nations reduce their flood risk.

This funding is available through FEMA's Flood Mitigation Assistance Swift Current program.

See below for details:
https://t.co/HPvzO93SCs

Chairman @RepWesterman is spot on.

The House has now passed the Fix Our Forests Act TWICE.

What is the Senate waiting for?
#AZ02

Yesterday, I joined a Veterans Care Panel focused on providing better care for our military and veteran communities.

We heard testimonies from warriors and organization leaders on combating veteran suicide and improving health outcomes.

Grateful to @ChadRobo for his leadership. https://t.co/HV9MQVT99T
Spot on.
Common sense.
It’s more than okay.
Congress almost always disappoints.
Common sense.

Grateful to my colleagues for unanimously adopting my amendment to the State Department appropriations bill today.

American taxpayers should not be paying for foreign military training unless we are fully reimbursed.

Proud to fight for #AZ02. https://t.co/XWus5vDO6n

Today, I spoke on the floor in support of my amendment to the State Department appropriations bill.

My provision prohibits funds in the Act from subsidizing military training that foreign nations should be paying for themselves.

Pleased to report it was adopted unanimously. https://t.co/SG1snn3cCq

Great getting to visit with students in town from Flagstaff and the Gila River Indian Community.

We discussed their experiences with the Boys & Girls Clubs of America. https://t.co/EsSezbstAf

Proud to be an original cosponsor of the PRIVACY Act, which closes loopholes the federal government exploits to bypass Fourth Amendment protections.

Grateful to @RepKeithSelf for his leadership on this critical issue.
RT @CoconinoCounty: The U.S. State Department Passport Acceptance Fair coming to the Flagstaff! Appointments are limited and walk-ins will…
RT @RepKeithSelf: The Sharia-Free America Caucus was pleased to hear from @Joel7Richardson, an expert on religion and geopolitical dynamics…
RT @Kelly4Humanity: Not enough reported on this one ⏬
RT @Joel7Richardson: Thanks again Rep. Crane. Tremendous privilege.

This evening, I joined @jsolomonReports and @AmandaHead to review several major national concerns.

We covered the alarming developments involving Jack Smith, the ongoing fight to protect the Fourth Amendment, and updates on the SAVE America Act. https://t.co/A3KHc2eKKd

A huge thanks to @Joel7Richardson for addressing today’s Sharia Free America Caucus meeting.

We heard his perspective on the moral, legal, and ethical concerns surrounding Sharia Law and ways to protect America from its consequences. https://t.co/MtOJ9X8tet

Enjoyed catching up with Members of the Navajo Nation Resource and Development Committee.

We discussed progress with the Legacy Mine Cleanup Act, enhanced gravel pit access, and the Energy Opportunities for All Act. https://t.co/xi546XjKaH
Truly demented.

Today's @NatResources hearing examined the tragic crisis concerning missing or murdered indigenous people.

I'm grateful to Executive Director O.J. Semans Sr. of the Coalition of Large Tribes for bringing attention to the case of Ella Mae Begay of the Navajo Nation. https://t.co/0ToTOyvuKU
This is how we keep democrats from ever launching another border invasion.

💯 

Who could possibly oppose this?
Thank you, @DAGToddBlanche. This is a big deal throughout #AZ02.

While democrats continue their march toward communism, the normal folks are working hard to clean up the mess that Joe Biden made.

We will keep fighting to make life more affordable and everything else less extreme. https://t.co/ZFhifIIySu

Congress should be passing the SAVE America Act, codifying President Trump’s successful border policies, and FINALLY banning stock trading by Members of Congress. 

There are no valid excuses.
For the small handful of Americans who are still wondering why nobody trusts Congress…

Why can’t an American do this job?

Congress should pass my bill, the End H-1B Visa Abuse Act of 2026.

Urge your representative to cosponsor.

I have a hard time believing that Democrats didn’t design it this way on purpose.

They rely on the fraud.

President Trump successfully halted the Democrats' premeditated border invasion.

However, if Democrats retake the White House, they will reverse his effective policies with the stroke of a pen.

We need to codify his agenda before it's too late:
https://t.co/yFG3AdRUKd

On Saturday, my staff partnered with the State Department to host a passport fair in Prescott Valley.

Thank you to everyone who helped make this possible as we were able to finalize and accept 77 applications.

Looking forward to the next event! #AZ02 https://t.co/gZmkYQighy

Great to see a Flagstaff company leading on this effort. #AZ02
https://t.co/BqsZnhJcba

This is how the same people who supported an open border deal with illegal criminals.

In this case, they granted the child rapist a pardon, so he wouldn't get deported to his home country.

These people are truly demented.
https://t.co/ebCvQfP4Ps
EXPOSE IT ALL AND END THE FRAUD - @nickshirleyy

True.

We should also pass new laws so that we can stop the radical left from ever launching another border crisis.

Can’t believe that lunatic almost became Vice President.

Thankfully, Arizonans rejected him.
Correct.
RT @RapidResponse47: UPDATE: Thanks to President Trump and @SecRubio, this convicted child rapist has been removed from our country. Thank…

This is the way.

Protecting the American people.
RT @DHSgov: THIS SICKO HAS BEEN DEPORTED. https://t.co/d5mK6uRvJL

ICYMI – @FEMA recently awarded grants to Prescott and the Havasupai Tribe for flood prevention projects.

Great news for communities across #AZ02: https://t.co/oXA89kY5Lr

Democrats have spent decades pushing cheap, reliable energy sources OFF the market. Killing the REAL jobs and communities around them in the process.

Now they’re trying to gaslight you about why your energy bills have gone up every step of the way. 

This isn’t rocket science.

This is why democrats freak out about modest work requirements for able-bodied working-age adults.

Keeps them from funneling cash to their donors in the insurance industrial complex.

All at YOUR expense.

Seems like a job that an American could do.

Congress should immediately pass my legislation, the End H-1B Visa Abuse Act of 2026.
So @nickshirleyy was right. Democrats were wrong.
A big deal for young families throughout #AZ02.

kurdistanMentions.text:
Enjoyed catching up with Members of the Navajo Nation Resource and Development Committee.

We discussed progress with the Legacy Mine Cleanup Act, enhanced gravel pit access, and the Energy Opportunities for All Act. https://t.co/xi546XjKaH

Democrats have spent decades pushing cheap, reliable energy sources OFF the market. Killing the REAL jobs and communities around them in the process.

Now they’re trying to gaslight you about why your energy bills have gone up every step of the way. 

This isn’t rocket science.

Thank you, @SecretaryWright.

Rural Arizonans have had enough.

Let’s get back to the basics. Reliable and affordable energy. Real jobs.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 3 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Elijah Crane. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 3 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-14T20:50:08Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
assessment.dominantFrame: Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language

As part of the Working Families Tax Cuts signed into law last year, Republicans established Trump Accounts to help set the next generation up for financial success.

This new savings program gives eligible children a head start with a one-time $1,000 federal contribution: https://t.co/3X8pC3KEy1
Huge wins for small business owners in #AZ02.
Critical work.
RT @ehdomenech: Fantastic work by the @forestservice team on this critical mineral project! South32’s Hermosa project was the first mining…
Good point.

Congress should immediately pass my bill, the End H-1B Visa Abuse Act of 2026, to pause and reform this highly abused program.

Urge your representative to cosponsor.

Thank you, @VP.

This is a big deal for so many hardworking Americans who are sick of getting screwed over by abused government programs.
True.
Good.

Grateful to @SecretaryTurner and the team at @HUDgov for awarding $1.5 million to both the Hopi and White Mountain Apache Tribes.

This funding will help construct and rehabilitate housing units for Tribal citizens. #AZ02 https://t.co/jMhQNTOdrV

The @USDA’s drought designations give our farmers and ranchers access to meaningful financial support during a difficult period.

I appreciate @SecRollins and her team for recognizing the seriousness of these conditions and taking action: https://t.co/srjry3a8RX

Recently, @USDA issued two designations naming several Arizona counties as primary natural disaster areas due to drought conditions.

Affected farmers and ranchers may be eligible for FSA emergency loan assistance.

See below for more info:
https://t.co/q0AocJNs1g

The H-1B system has morphed into a betrayal of hardworking American citizens.

I introduced the End H-1B Visa Abuse Act of 2026 to halt and reform this flawed program.

We can’t accept the status quo.

Democrats will do it all again if given the chance. 

The good news is we can stop them.

I’m proud of the fact that America is the best country in the history of the world.

If we keep fighting for common sense, it will stay that way. 🇺🇸

Yesterday, I visited Coolidge Municipal Airport.

They recently received more than $6 million from @USDOT for infrastructure improvements.

Grateful to Mayor Jon Thompson and Airport Manager James Myers for updating me on the project and its next steps. #AZ02 https://t.co/4mX9TVSNPr

Good.

Congress should pass my bill, the End H-1B Visa Abuse Act of 2026.
A big win for Arizona. Thank you, @SecRollins.

Had a chance to tour Robles Boxing & Fitness in Coolidge this afternoon.

They have a great team and an incredible setup. I would highly recommend checking it out! #AZ02 https://t.co/ttV06p6gnD

I had a chance to join @PinalCSO for a ride-along this morning.

Thank you to Sheriff Teeple and his amazing team for all of the good work they do to keep residents safe. #AZ02 https://t.co/4hccsom3ip

I was honored to join @caseymurph1 and @johnrich at last week's MOU signing to combat lawfare targeting America’s farmers and ranchers.

We appreciate @SecRollins and @SBA_Kelly for their leadership in bringing @USDA and @SBAgov together to support these hardworking patriots. https://t.co/XeqQjpfKFt

Thank you, @SecretaryWright.

Rural Arizonans have had enough.

Let’s get back to the basics. Reliable and affordable energy. Real jobs.
Great news for Arizona.

This morning, my Director of Military and Veteran Services attended the Veteran Stand Down in Peach Springs.

Thank you to the Hualapai Tribe for hosting this event, which connects veterans with valuable resources and assistance on VA-related concerns. #AZ02 https://t.co/jSxXwvYLPG

Keep up the great work, @SecVetAffairs.

Americans appreciate your commitment and success in expediting benefits and care for our nation's veterans:
https://t.co/tL2ENeIuSc
A great opportunity for young families throughout rural Arizona. #AZ02
Correct.
A great opportunity for young families throughout #AZ02.

Democrats will do it again if given the chance. 

They don’t care about affordability.

They care about power.

My constituents overwhelmingly oppose the Camino Madre Renewable Power Project in Yavapai County, and I stand with them.

I recently sent a letter to @USDA and @forestservice urging them to use their full authority to block this proposal: https://t.co/F09OtajfUO
Check it out, #AZ02! A great chance to invest in your family’s future.
A big win for hardworking Arizonans who rely on tips.
RT @WhiteHouse: Free to set up and available for ALL U.S. children. Trump Accounts will help make America's next generation rich. https://t…

ICYMI – The @USDOT awarded more than $6 million to boost infrastructure at Coolidge Municipal Airport.

We're grateful for this positive development for Pinal County: https://t.co/cJIcctXZz7

On Friday, my staff presented a certificate of recognition during the dedication of the new flagpole and 40x80 American flag on State Route 260 in Heber.

Thanks to Shaunalee Porter, the Heber‑Overgaard Community Resource Network, and everyone who made this possible. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/V9iHNUbZ3Y

Even when Congress can’t keep its priorities straight, my priority will always be the people of #AZ02.

Listening to YOU and moving legislation on your behalf is what representation is all about.

Here is just some of what we’ve been able to accomplish together: https://t.co/ZSzQDcpqY9
